name: kern
description: Multi-agent design quality harness. Orchestrates specialist agents for typography, color, layout, copy, and accessibility through a 6-phase pipeline. Picks a varied subset of anti-patterns per run with an audit log, runs four critics in parallel (design, hierarchy, interaction, microcopy), and synthesizes findings into a consensus sameness score. Built for Shadcn/Radix/Next.js stacks.
